## OpenBahn Navigator v0.23.4

### Fixes

- load full vehicle route via fahrt and board mitVias fallback

### Install

Download the attached **OpenBahnNavigator** debug APK (CI-signed).

**F-Droid custom repo:** [Add repository](https://t-vk.github.io/FossBahn/fdroid/) — `https://t-vk.github.io/FossBahn/fdroid/repo` (package `de.openbahn.navigator.debug`).

_Built automatically from `main`._
